Thought 4: The direct witness observation places Mackenzie at the crime scene (the secluded area) at the critical time. This is the strongest piece of evidence. While Erika has a motive and the skills to use the axe, she is not placed at the scene of the murder itself. Mackenzie also has a strong financial motive (Nelson's audit threatening to expose her suspicious transactions and lavish lifestyle). Therefore, Mackenzie is the most likely murderer.
